ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., APH) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Healthcare, Technology) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Pharmaceuticals, Software) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's IPO */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid on the given date */,
  "stock_splits" INTEGER /* Number of stock splits on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ, third-party API) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the historical price data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., theme, language, notification settings) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone of the user */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_channels" TEXT /* Preferred notification channels (e.g., email, SMS, push notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the watchlist is public or private */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the watchlist is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes about the stock */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether an alert is active for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, dividend) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is currently active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_channels" TEXT /* Notification channels for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., stock performance, market trend) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Serialized data of the report (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, share) for each user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
